creator: roelof@nisser.com
text:
<Precise description of the problem (multiple lines)>
Upon installation fails to insert either AddHandler or the
other thingum to make it usable

Fix: 

<How to correct or work around the problem, if known (multiple lines)>
    # RO added for mod_ruby as per README.en
    #  LoadModule ruby_module `apachelibexec'/mod_ruby.{so|o}
    #  AddHandler ruby-script .rb
    # or
    #  Alias /ruby/ /usr/lib/cgi-bin/
    #  <Location /ruby/>
    #  SetHandler ruby-script
    #  Options ExecCGI
    #  </Location>
    <IfModule mod_ruby.c>
        AddHandler ruby-script .rb
    </IfModule>

Sorry, have no diffs. The above is pasted from the README.en file. With
my choice of solution appended to it. It does the trick.

        <Code/input/activities to reproduce the problem (multiple lines)>
make install in the www/mod_ruby directory
